prompt:
You are an Amazon SP-API listing specialist and an expert at writing search-engine-optimized (SEO) Amazon listings. For the product below, write an item_name of AT MOST 75 characters and a title_differentiation of AT MOST 125 characters. Always return both, each within its own limit. === PRODUCT CONTEXT === SKU: UPD-FOLDBUILD-GLC87956K-BUN Product Type: TOY_VEHICLE_SET Brand (from catalog): Hot Wheels Existing Title: Hot Wheels Track Builder Toy Set for Boys Ages 6-12 - Fold Up Pack Description: Give kids the gift of great ideas. The Hot Wheels Track Builder accessory playsets offer unlimited experimental building, stunting and boosting challenges with innovative component pieces and accessories to add to existing Hot Wheels track sets. All Track Builders packs easily connect to other Hot Wheels track sets (sold separately), for designing original track builds whether for driving, stunting or racing.

HOT WHEELS TRACK BUILDER LONG JUMP STUNT PACK: Kids can stunt over tracks with the cross connectors and add challenging stunt action to their own builds; the ramp is flippable so they can take the route and not stunt, too. Includes a Hot Wheels 1:64 scale vehicle

HOT WHEELS TRACK BUILDER LOOP KICKER PACK: The Loop Kicker Pack adds momentum to kid's cars when doing a stunt with loop acceleration, whether they're racing or gearing up to do an even bigger stunt. Includes a Hot Wheels 1:64 scale vehicle

HOT WHEELS TRACK BUILDER PREMIUM CURVE PACK: Kids can create a dynamic route through any build with the versatile Premium Curve Pack; the curves and straight track in this pack have varied lengths of 12 inch and 6 inch; Includes a Hot Wheels 1:64 scale vehicle

HOT WHEELS TRACK BUILDER FOLD UP TRACK PACK: Kids can create a dynamic route through any build with the track pack, lengthening the race or transitioning to a stunt; with 12 feet of straight track and 5 hinge connectors that fold both ways for easy storage; Includes a Hot Wheels 1:64 scale vehicle

Let the building, designing and track innovation begin.

Recommended Ages: 6-10 Search Terms: vehicle kids playset kids vehicles vehicle playset vehicle for kids playsets for kids vehicles for kids car vehicle for kids vehicle kids cat vehicle toys for kids cat vehicles for kids playset for kids mini vehicle playset toy vehicle playsets Features: - HOT WHEELS TRACK BUILDER FOLD UP STUNT PACK: Kids can stunt over tracks with the cross connectors and add challenging stunt action to their own builds; the ramp is flippable so they can take the route and not stunt, too! Includes a Hot Wheels 1:64 scale vehicle - HOT WHEELS TRACK BUILDER LOOP KICKER PACK: The Loop Kicker Pack adds momentum to kid's cars when doing a stunt with loop acceleration, whether they're racing or gearing up to do an even bigger stunt! Includes a Hot Wheels 1:64 scale vehicle - HOT WHEELS TRACK BUILDER PREMIUM CURVE PACK: Kids can create a dynamic route through any build with the versatile Premium Curve Pack; the curves and straight track in this pack have varied lengths of 12 inch and 6 inch; Includes a Hot Wheels 1:64 scale vehicle - HOT WHEELS TRACK BUILDER FOLD UP TRACK PACK: Kids can create a dynamic route through any build with the track pack, lengthening the race or transitioning to a stunt; with 12 feet of straight track and 5 hinge connectors that fold both ways for easy storage; Includes a Hot Wheels 1:64 scale vehicle - SPECIFICATIONS: Material: Plastic; Color: Multi; Ages: 6-10; Note: Connects with other Hot Wheels track sets (sold separately); Included: Track Set with x1 Hot Wheels 1:64 scale vehicle === ITEM_NAME (title, <= 75 chars) === Write a concise, keyword-rich, SEO-optimized item_name — a shopper-facing title, not a part number. Derive these tokens, then assemble the title from them in order: ${brand} ${pack_size}-${pack_size_unit} ${size} ${color} ${name} - brand: use the catalog brand above. - pack_size + pack_size_unit: parse from the existing title (e.g. "4-pk", or a dimension like 13" -> pack_size "13", pack_size_unit "in"). Omit if absent. - size, color, name: parse from the existing title (name = what the product IS). Drop any token you cannot determine; never emit the SKU, MPN, or a part number. Lead with the brand; condense to AT MOST 75 characters. Amazon schema guidance: Provide a title for the item that may be customer facing === TITLE_DIFFERENTIATION (item highlight, 100–125 chars) === Write a compact, comma-separated list of the product's strongest, most search-relevant features/benefits — NOT a full sentence, NOT the brand, and NOT a repeat of the item_name (e.g. "Set of 6, Dishwasher Safe, 8oz, BPA-Free, Stackable"). Use the available space: aim for 100–125 characters, leading with the highest-value keywords. Never pad with filler or repeat a point. Capitalize the first letter of every word (e.g. "Natural Wood Grain", but keep acronyms like "US" fully uppercase). Do not use special characters — spell out "&" as "and" and "=" as "is" (e.g. "Yellow Is Real", "Works On US And International Currency"); only hyphen, double quote, and apostrophe are allowed. Amazon schema guidance: Provide product features or benefit driven phrases, not a full sentence. Information will appear only when the item name is under 75 characters. Do not repeat information already in the item name. === RETURN === Return ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown fences, in this exact shape: {"item_name": "<= 75 char title", "tokens": {"brand": "", "pack_size": "", "pack_size_unit": "", "size": "", "color": "", "name": ""}, "title_differentiation": "<= 125 char benefit phrase"}
